data.body: Investigation 2026-04-13: Code inspection shows get_artifacts_dir() in hooks/lib/deps.sh (line 267-270) correctly returns WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR when set. record-test-status.sh calls ARTIFACTS_DIR=$(get_artifacts_dir) and all code paths use this variable. All 9 attest tests pass. harvest-worktree.sh correctly passes WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR when calling record-test-status.sh --attest. Cannot reproduce the bug in current code. May have been fixed by prior commits. Escalated to user for closure decision.
